rule: No science claim may be published without a verified source entry in source_registry.json. All claims in this file remain draft or pending_source until sources are locked.

claims.statement: PubChem (NIH) has a compound record for Hydrosulfide (CID 5047209).
claims.notes: Government scientific database confirmation of Hydrosulfide as a registered compound. CID is candidate — verify against PubChem before source-locking.

claims.statement: PubChem (NIH) has a compound record for Sodium hydrosulfide (NaHS, CID 28015).
claims.notes: Government scientific database confirmation of Sodium hydrosulfide as a registered compound. CID is candidate — verify against PubChem before source-locking. Supports the naming relationship between sodium hydrosulfide and sodium bisulfide.

claims.statement: The NIST Chemistry WebBook has an entry for Hydrogen sulfide (H2S, CAS 7783-06-4).
claims.notes: Government scientific database confirmation of Hydrogen sulfide as a registered compound with NIST data. Supports the hydrogen_sulfide term record. Safety content governance applies to any future published claims from this source.
